headline: Why Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) Is In Focus
summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) is among the 10 Best Performing S&P 500 Stocks in the Last 2 Years. On February 23, KeyBanc lifted the price target on Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) to $639 from $350 and maintained an Overweight rating. headline: Why Texas Pacific Land Corporation Rallied Over 50% in February
summary: Texas Pacific is well-positioned for the AI data center build-out and the energy and water needs that accompany it.
